Description: Processing function inventory for Physio QC. BIDS-style tabular sidecar for docs/bids_processing/processing_functions.tsv.

stage.Description: Pipeline stage for the function (cleaning, detection, rate, quality, metrics, pipeline).

function.Description: Function name(s) implemented in the codebase.

module.Description: Source module path in the repository.

primary_library.Description: Primary numerical/physiology library used by that function.

default_method.Description: Default method setting as implemented by defaults in config and/or function signature.

params_keys.Description: Primary parameter keys consumed by that function/pipeline. Multiple keys are pipe-delimited.

neurokit2_usage.Description: How NeuroKit2 is used in that function.

powerline_60_usage.Description: Whether explicit 60 Hz powerline filtering is applied.

notes.Description: Implementation notes for consistency and caveats.
